action: Session 012 initialized. Mode: SCOUT. Creativity constraint: mod 5 == 2 => One candidate must connect a field established >50 years ago with one established <10 years ago.
Dispatching Cycle 2 generation with evolved hypotheses E1-E4, critic questions, and computational validation context.
result: 6 hypotheses generated: 3 evolved (C2-H1, C2-H2, C2-H5), 3 fresh (C2-H3, C2-H4, C2-H6). Key improvement: incorporated DP1 binding data (Ka ~ 670 M-1) revealing concentration constraints.

2 KILLED (C2-H4: MnTE-2-PyP stable, no free Mn release; C2-H6: Mn-ferroptosis already published + Mn Fenton weak). 4 survived (C2-H1 wounded, C2-H2 wounded, C2-H3 wounded, C2-H5 moderate). Kill rate 33%.

action: Dispatching Cycle 2 ranking on 6 critiqued hypotheses.
result: Rankings: C2-H1 (8.20), C2-H5 (7.80), C2-H2 (7.30), C2-H6 (6.40), C2-H3 (5.60), C2-H4 (5.40). Diversity PASSED. Elo consistent.

action: EVOLVER SKIPPED: Top-3 all >= 6.5 composite, diversity passed, no shared bridges. Proceeding directly to Quality Gate.
Quality Gate on top hypotheses from both cycles. External critique found prior Michalke (2006-2016) Mn speciation work. C2-H1 downgraded PASS to CONDITIONAL_PASS.
result: 0 PASS, 5 CONDITIONAL_PASS (C2-H1, C2-H5, E1, C2-H2, E4), 5 FAIL (E3, C2-H3, C2-H4, C2-H6, H4). Key finding: Michalke 2006-2016 prior work on Mn speciation; Gemini corrected E4 Irving-Williams dose-response inversion.
contradiction_mining VALIDATED (35.7% pass+cond rate). Ka is #1 kill factor. Framework/measurement > molecule when Ka weak.

action: Gemini completed (5/5 hypotheses). GPT-5.4 completed with detailed reasoning. Export files generated.
result: Gemini: formal isomorphism for EPR (9/10), critical correction for E4 (Irving-Williams inversion). GPT: systematic evaluation with PARTIALLY_EXPLORED verdicts for several hypotheses.
